name: chile-compliance
description: Structured access to Chilean fintech and personal-data laws for AI consumers. Covers Ley 21.521 (Fintec) and Ley 19.628 as amended by Ley 21.719 (in force 2026-12-01).

notes.19628_consolidated: Títulos VI-VIII (Arts. 30-55, regulatory framework added by 21.719) contain English summaries pending full literal translation in H4. Spanish text is verbatim. 44 REVIEW markers in those Títulos.
